attributes.readMe:
# Doraemon ## Summary The `Doraemon` card spec defines a card that represents the iconic anime/manga character Doraemon. This card can be used to display information about Doraemon, such as his appearance, abilities, and relationships with other characters. ## Import ```javascript import { Doraemon } from '../doraemon'; ``` ## Usage as a Field To use the `Doraemon` card as a field within a consuming card or field, you can define it as a `linksTo` field: ```javascript import { CardDef, FieldDef } from '@cardstack/core/card-api'; export class MyCard extends CardDef { static displayName = 'My Card'; doraemon = FieldDef.linksTo(Doraemon); } ``` ## Template Usage Within the template of a consuming card or field, you can display the `Doraemon` card using the `<@fields.doraemon />` syntax: ```handlebars

About Doraemon

<@fields.doraemon />
``` This will render the `Doraemon` card within the consuming card or field.
